types1:Item.types1:Name: SDasInsertRecordsETQ
types1:Item.types1:Description: @operation=Send Assignments from Workday to ETQ, @dataType=Workday Trainings, @source=WorkDay, @target=ETQ, @apiName=SIntSendAssignmentsETQREST, @additionalText=API used to send assignment courses to ETQ, @prcRunOn=SDCAMDMSA01, @prcAllowedGroups=ServiceConsumer

process.name: SDasInsertRecordsETQ
process.description: @operation=Send Assignments from Workday to ETQ, @dataType=Workday Trainings, @source=WorkDay, @target=ETQ, @apiName=SIntSendAssignmentsETQREST, @additionalText=API used to send assignment courses to ETQ, @prcRunOn=SDCAMDMSA01, @prcAllowedGroups=ServiceConsumer

parameter.description: Corresponding ID related to the Message
parameter.name: in_LogID

field.description: Entire Response from ETQ where the duplicated trainigns and the non duplicated are updated or created.
field.name: out_PrcResult

operation.expression:
let $xmlItem := $temp.vTempXMLPayloadNonDuplicated
for $SampleDocument in $xmlItem return <Document xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true"> <applicationName>{ $SampleDocument/*:applicationName/text() }</applicationName> <formName>{ $SampleDocument/*:formName/text() }</formName> <phase>{ $SampleDocument/*:phase/text() }</phase> { for $samplefields in $SampleDocument/*:Fields return <Fields xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true"> <fieldName>{ $samplefields/*:fieldName/text() }</fieldName> <Values xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true">{ $samplefields/*:Values/text() }</Values> </Fields> } </Document>

let $xmlItem := $temp.vTempXMLPayload
for $SampleDocument in $xmlItem return <Document xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true"> <applicationName>{ $SampleDocument/*:applicationName/text() }</applicationName> <formName>{ $SampleDocument/*:formName/text() }</formName> <documentId>{ $temp.vTempDuplicated/text() }</documentId> { for $samplefields in $SampleDocument/*:Fields return <Fields xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true"> <fieldName>{ $samplefields/*:fieldName/text() }</fieldName> <Values xmlns:m="urn:informatica:ae:xquery:json2xml:meta-data" m:isArray="true">{ $samplefields/*:Values/text() }</Values> </Fields> } </Document>

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/code )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultViewETQAssignments[1]/code )
fn:concat($temp.vTempErrorMessage,', Agent: ',util:resolveURN('urn:agent'),', Instance: ', util:getProcessId(),' PipeMessage ',$temp.vTempMessageIICS ,', Instance: ', util:getProcessId() )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SDasInsertRecordsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/code )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SDasInsertRecordsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultGetTokenETQ[1]/code )
fn:concat($temp.vTempErrorMessage,', Agent: ',util:resolveURN('urn:agent'),', Instance: ', util:getProcessId(),' PipeMessage ',$temp.vTempMessageIICS ,', Instance: ', util:getProcessId() )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/code )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ',$output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultUpdatePUTETQ[1]/code )
fn:concat($temp.vTempErrorMessage,', Agent: ',util:resolveURN('urn:agent'),', Instance: ', util:getProcessId(),' PipeMessage ',$temp.vTempMessageIICS ,', Instance: ', util:getProcessId() )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ', $output.faultInsertETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultInsertETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultInsertETQ[1]/code )

fn:concat('ERP: Workday - ETQ, Process: SIntSendAssignmentsETQ, Detail Error: ', $output.faultInsertETQ[1]/detail ,' , Reason: ', $output.faultInsertETQ[1]/reason ,' ErrorCode: ',$output.faultInsertETQ[1]/code )
fn:concat($temp.vTempErrorMessage,', Agent: ',util:resolveURN('urn:agent'),', Instance: ', util:getProcessId(),' PipeMessage ',$temp.vTempMessageIICS ,', Instance: ', util:getProcessId() )

ns1:SampleData.ns1:Name: TEST25Records
ns1:SampleData.ns1:Data: { "Document": [ { "applicationName": "ETQ_TRAINING", "formName": "ETQ_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_RECORD", "phase": "ETQ_TRAINING_ASSIGNED", "Fields": [ { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_D", "Values": ["Evolve"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_EVOLVE_INTEGRATION_FLAG_D", "Values": ["Yes"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_ASSIGNED_USER_NAME_PPG_ID_D", "Values": ["300450"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_WORKER_TYPE_D", "Values": ["Employee"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_ASSIGNED_BY_D", "Values": ["Sebastian Wojtasik"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_ASSIGNED_DATE_D", "Values": ["Oct 31, 2022"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_ASSIGNMENT_STATUS_D", "Values": ["Completed"] }, { "fieldName": "ETQ_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_INFORMATION_DUE_DATE", "Values": ["Dec 31, 2022"] }, { "fieldName": "ETQ_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_INFORMATION_COURSE_NAME", "Values": ["EHS-Global: Business Travelers - Driver Safety Requirements (Polish)"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_OVERDUE_D", "Values": ["Yes"] }, { "fieldName": "ETQ_TRAINING_ASSIGNMENT_COMPLETED_DATE", "Values": [""] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_REFERENCE_ID_D", "Values": ["4c36fcfab13d1000af833435b89a0001"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_REQUIRED_D", "Values": ["Yes"] }, { "fieldName": "PPG_TRAINING_A_WAIVE_REASON_D",
